_doc: Automation-ready alert rule definitions for Haven garden. These are v2 definitions -- not live HA automations yet. 2 beds, multiple rules per bed.

message.en: Bed A (Family Bed) soil moisture is below 40% -- time to water!
message.da: Bed A (Familiebed) jordfugtighed er under 40% -- tid til at vande!

message.en: Bed A (Family Bed) soil moisture is above 55% -- soil may be too wet for thyme.
message.da: Bed A (Familiebed) jordfugtighed er over 55% -- jorden kan vaere for vad til timian.

message.en: Frost warning for Bed A (Family Bed)! Soil temperature at 0C. Cover sensitive plants with fleece.
message.da: Frostadvarsel for Bed A (Familiebed)! Jordtemperatur ved 0C. Daek folsomme planter med fiberdug.

message.en: Bed A (Family Bed) soil moisture is below 45% -- cucumbers and tomatoes need water!
message.da: Bed A (Familiebed) jordfugtighed er under 45% -- agurker og tomater har brug for vand!

message.en: Bed A (Family Bed) soil moisture is above 65% -- too wet for borage.
message.da: Bed A (Familiebed) jordfugtighed er over 65% -- for vadt til hjulkrone.

message.en: Cold warning for Bed A (Family Bed)! Soil at 4C -- cucumbers, basil, and peppers are frost-sensitive. Cover or bring indoors.
message.da: Kuldeadvarsel for Bed A (Familiebed)! Jord ved 4C -- agurker, basilikum og peberfrugter er frostfolsomme. Daek til eller tag ind.

message.en: Cold warning for Bed A (Family Bed)! Soil at 2C -- beans are frost-sensitive. Cover tonight.
message.da: Kuldeadvarsel for Bed A (Familiebed)! Jord ved 2C -- boenner er frostfolsomme. Daek til i aften.

message.en: Bed B (His Bed) soil moisture is below 40% -- time to water!
message.da: Bed B (Hans Bed) jordfugtighed er under 40% -- tid til at vande!

message.en: Bed B (His Bed) soil moisture is above 50% -- soil may be too wet for lambs ear.
message.da: Bed B (Hans Bed) jordfugtighed er over 50% -- jorden kan vaere for vad til lammeoere.

message.en: Frost warning for Bed B (His Bed)! Soil temperature at 0C. Cover sensitive plants with fleece.
message.da: Frostadvarsel for Bed B (Hans Bed)! Jordtemperatur ved 0C. Daek folsomme planter med fiberdug.
